title: REAL ID
desc: Federal ID standard enforced for domestic air travel. The unique key joining most other databases.

title: Mobile Driver's Licenses
desc: State-issued digital IDs in Apple/Google wallets. Normalizes presenting ID as a phone-tap.

title: EU Digital Identity Wallet
desc: Mandated rollout 2026. Cross-border digital ID precedent watched by US policymakers.

title: Flock Safety ALPRs
desc: License plate readers deployed by 5000+ municipalities. National Lookup shares data federally without local consent.

title: TSA Facial Recognition
desc: Biometric boarding at 80+ US airports. Opt-out exists but is friction-loaded.

title: Cell Tower Geolocation
desc: Bulk location data purchased by federal agencies from data brokers, sidestepping warrant requirements.

title: Municipal Flock Cancellations
desc: 30+ localities deactivated cameras since early 2025 (Mountain View, Santa Cruz, Cambridge, Eugene, Flagstaff). Civic counter-move.

title: GENIUS Act
desc: Federal framework for payment stablecoins. The regulatory rail through which programmable money arrives.

title: Anti-CBDC Surveillance State Act
desc: House 219-217, Senate ban until 2031. Removes the obvious threat — but private programmable rails proceed.

title: Canadian Trucker Account Freezes
desc: February 2022. Hundreds of accounts frozen without court order under invoked emergency powers. Proof-of-concept.

title: USDC / Circle
desc: Treasury-backed stablecoin. Rules enforceable by issuer or court order at the contract level.

title: Operation Choke Point 2.0
desc: Pattern of regulator pressure causing banks to drop disfavored customers (crypto firms, gun dealers, others). No paper trail.

title: Palantir Gotham/Foundry
desc: Joins previously unjoinable datasets at scale. The query layer that makes the other layers actionable.

title: Homeland Security Task Force
desc: Fuses foreign intel with domestic enforcement. Dissolves prior oversight architecture (OCDETF). Institutional buyer.

title: DHS Fusion Centers
desc: 80+ state/local fusion centers. The pre-existing nervous system HSTF inherits and amplifies.

title: Definition-of-Enemy Expansion
desc: Arendt: enemy categories expand to absorb dissidents. The label 'criminal' applied to peaceful protest.

title: Friction Collapse
desc: Tyranny used to be expensive because watching cost labor. Removing friction is the qualitative change.

title: Havel: Post-Totalitarian System
desc: Compliance built into architecture of daily life. No coercion needed — you just want lunch.

title: AI Data Center Buildout
desc: Compute capacity is the physical substrate. Local zoning fights are the new civic terrain.

title: Port Washington Data Center Vote
desc: Wisconsin voters 2-to-1 required voter approval for data center tax incentives. Replicable civic template.

title: CISA Advisory AA26-097A
desc: April 2026 joint alert: Iranian APTs targeting US water/energy PLCs. Infrastructure fragility as control-stack exposure.
